entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, `trigger` TEXT NOT NULL, `expansion` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_shortcuts_trigger
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_shortcuts_trigger` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`trigger`)
